titleStmt.title: SII 10.707: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 707. (A.R. No. 368 of 1905.) ON A PILLAR LYING NEAR A PRIVATE THRESHING FLOOR SOUTH-WEST OF RELLIVALASA, VIZIANAGARAM TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1075. (8th year of Anantavarmadēva.)

summary.p: Records gift of land, with all emoluments, in the village of Taṭaṟam in the Tālaṇḍa-Twelve for the worship of the god, maintenance of dancing girls etc., in the temple of Chōḻagaṅga-Mādhavadēva. The gift was made by Arusagonddalarāvuta, brother-in-law of the king, in the presence of god Vīrabhadrēśvara, on the bank of the river Vaṁśadhārā for the prosperity of Kāmārnavadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti namaramukhānēkarivudarppama
rddana bhujaparākrama paramamahē
svara paramabhaṭṭāraka mahārājādhirāja rā
japaramēsvara gaṁggāsvayānalaṁbanastaṁbhbha
śrīmadanaṁtavarmmadēvara pravarddhamāna
vijayarājyasaṁgvatsaraṁbulu 8 srāhi śaka
varṣaṁbulu 1075 nēṇṭi makara kri 6 yu guru
vāramuna nararānavīṭa Eṟadapaṁppuna tālaṁḍa
paṁḍreṇṭilōni taṭaṟāna valayacuṭṭuna bhūmisa
mastāyamulu kōru ĀṁttarayaAbhinavāyamu
lu kaḻapakiḻaṟa Āḻuguvēṁḻupavadi sēnāpati
kāniki lōpugā niṁdula cōḻagaṁggamādhavadēvara
havibaliArccanalaku niguḍiṁgōli bēḍisā nula
ku vādyakāṟaku pūjārivaḍuvulu berasina pra
kritijītabutṛlaku Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigā Utta rā
yaṇasaṁkrāṁtināṁḍu vaṁśachārānadītīramunavī
rabhadrīśvaradēvarasannidhānamuna śrīkāmārnnava
dēvara śrībhujavarddhanagā rācamaṟaṁdi Arusago
ṁddalarāvuta tama sarvvabhyaṁttara maina jīta vaṭṭulō
pala rācadharmmuvugā dhārāpūrvvakamu sē si Icciti
mi dīni nevva rēni naḍma vakrambu sēsinavāru gaṁggakaṟuta
vēyi gavulala vadhiyiṁccina pātakamunaṁ bōdu
ru dīnivarddhanagā naḍipinavāru viṣṇulōkamuvā
Digital edition of SII 10.707 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
